bugs.report_text: Products are displaying in a single column layout instead of spreading across multiple columns on larger screens.
The cart panel is being hidden behind other page elements when opened.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="absolute top-16 right-0 z-40 w-96 bg-white shadow-2xl p-6 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto border-l-4 border-yellow-400">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="absolute top-16 right-0 z-10 w-96 bg-white shadow-2xl p-6 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto border-l-4 border-yellow-400">

bugs.report_text: The footer heading is not displaying the intended color and appears invisible.
The footer list text is too dark and difficult to read against the dark footer background.
The hero section is overlapping with content below it, causing misalignment and visual collision on the page.
bugs.neg_code: <header className="relative bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-900 via-gray-800 to-gray-900 h-[600px] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
bugs.pos_code: <header className="relative bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-900 via-gray-800 to-gray-900 h-[600px] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden -mb-40">

bugs.report_text: The navigation bar is appearing behind page content instead of floating on top of the page.
The navigation items are stacking vertically down the page instead of displaying horizontally across the navigation bar.
The product cards are abnormally large with excessive internal spacing, causing them to overflow outside the container.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition duration-300 transform hover:scale-105">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="group relative bg-white rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition duration-300 transform hover:scale-105 p-64">

bugs.report_text: The product placeholder text is not displaying the correct color and appears invisible.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="w-full h-full bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-300 to-gray-400 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-500 font-bold text-2xl">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="w-full h-full bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-300 to-gray-400 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-99 font-bold text-2xl">

bugs.report_text: The search input text becomes completely invisible when typed because the text color blends into the input background.
bugs.neg_code: className="w-full px-4 py-3 border-2 border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-yellow-400 transition"
bugs.pos_code: className="w-full px-4 py-3 border-2 border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-yellow-400 transition bg-white text-white"
